transcript.text:
[Daegu Mungtigi (sliced raw beef)]
Did you just say you are going to eat 10 servings of raw meat by yourself?
Holy moly
This is totally different from regular yukhoe (Korean-style tartare)
Wow, excuse me, this is incredible
Is that your 8th plate?
Can I also get 1 order of regular yukhoe, please?
Hello everyone~
I'm here in Daegu to try mungtigi (sliced raw beef) since it's very popular here
It's like a hole in the wall restaurant
Most of the restaurants were closed in the morning probably because it's Sunday
So, I've been walking around for like 4-5 hours and found this place
I'm very hungry right now
Let's head inside
[Song-lim Sikdang, Dong county, city of Daegu]
Excuse me, can I get 10 servings of raw beef please?

You said 10?
Did you just say 10 servings? By yourself?
There's no way you can finish the whole thing!
-Don't worry, ma'am. I can handle it. -You sure?
Oh I think I've watched one of your videos
Excuse me, ma'am. Can I also get 1 order of beef doenjang-jjigae (soy bean paste stew with beef)?
Of course! Everything on the menu is delicious and won't be there if it's not
Then, please give me one of that, ma'am
I found this hidden restaurant on a blog and figured that it is mostly run by the regulars
And I also heard that they got some special sauce that's on point. I'm excited
[Side dishes are served first before the meat]
Potatoes!
Thank you !
[A table full of side dishes]
Thank you~
There's a lot more

Excuse me?! Dude, she's bringing more!
Why so many side dishes?
This is mul-kimchi (water kimchi)
I made all of them
Really?
These are cheonyeop (omasum) and liver
I'll give you the oil sauce for that
I didn't even get the main dishes, but the table is already full
They are tasty
Liver!
I love this so much
It's amazing
What is this?
That's the sauce
The sauce? She put it in a gigantic bowl
-Is it normally served in this big bowl? -Yes it is

I told you that our sauce is very popular in our restaurant.
[The muntigi dish arrives]
It looks yummy
Incredible
Thank you
You have to mix it well
So this is everything
It looks so tasty
You know I love yukhoe so much
The color of the meat is insane
Let's try the big cubed one first
Bon appetit! Let's try it without the sauce
Straight meat itself
It's so good
I found out that mungtigi restaurants open on weekdays only
because they have to cut and serve the meat upon delivery

But this particular restaurant sells aged beef on weekends
and obviously the raw beef on weekdays just like the other restaurants
Raw beef can be too chewy but I heard that the aged beef is relatively tender
And it is for real
So this is what you do at mungtigi restaurants
The meat doesn't slip even if you flip the plate
Look, it really doesn't
You see this?
Oops, it fell off
Don't shake it too roughly.
This is the sauce that the owner has been talking about
Dip it in the sauce and eat with the chives
Yummy
There are 2 ways of cutting it
Cubing and slicing
This one is the cubed one, and that is the sliced one

Let's try the sliced one
This is tasty as well.
How does this taste more savory when both are the same meat?
So tasty
Make a skewer
The meat scent is amazing
5 pieces at once!
Dip it in the sauce
[That means it's tasty]
The thick ones are not hard to chew at all
Dip it in the sauce
This is totally different from regular yukhoe (Korean-style tartare)
It's so tasty, ma'am
I'ma make a yukhoe skewer
Look
I've never seen a raw garlic in any sauce like this

Tastes sour and spicy along with garlic scent
The sauce is on point
I'm really sad that I came here on Sunday. I really want to come here again on weekdays
You know, since they only sell mungtigi on weekdays due to the freshness of the meat
I should come back on weekdays
Let's build a tower with it
It's really yummy
Let's try with oil sauce
I don't think 10 plates are enough for me
There's no point of having 2 different cuts if I eat the sliced meat all together like this
Actually, it's slightly different
It's still more tender than the thick one
They don't have the white streaks on the surface
It's solid red
literally
It looks like a tongue

-Chew it well, sweetie -haha
Oops, I almost dropped it
Usually, I don't get to eat this much yukhoe like this
I quit
Did I already finish 6 plates?
I don't get full eating delicious food
Do you?
Pick up a big one
Why do I love eating something raw so much? Especially meat and fish
To be honest, I prefer my beef and pork rare
-I got you some tangguk (beef radish soup) -Thank you, but....
I really don't like radish ma'am..
[I'll give it to your director]
[You didn't have to take it away]
Now, I want to try it
Let me go get a sip real quick

Wow, it tastes so good
The soup is amazing. Should I take it back? haha
Just like this
The meat is all gone already. That was so fast
[Can't stop thinking about the soup]
This is insane
I didn't know that radish soup can be this tasty
Thank you
Wow, the soup looks very rich
This can't go wrong
I think she used the thick homemade doenjang from countryside
Black soybean paste!
I told you this can't be bad
It's not like the regular doenjang that you can have in the city. This is from the countryside
Is that your 8th plate?
Yes, I almost finished it haha

-Holy moly -Haha
I was going to make any leftover to-go for you
I saw someone making a to-go order for yukhoe
Can I get 1 order of yuhoe please
[She doesn't worry about her anymore]
It's really good
I'm almost done..
I forgot that I ordered yukhoe
That's perfect
Wow finally
Thank you
It looks really tasty
It's sweet
Excuse me?
I said I'm worried because you eat too much
How do you like it?

It's fantastic
The meat is really yummy
[Did something drop?]
Even the pear slices are really good
[She killed it without drinking alcohol]
Thank you
It's called "Hometown report" everyday at 6 o'clock
I will brag about it to my customers
Since today is Sunday, I could not try the mungtigi raw meat. So, I am very...
